news.summary: The Jøtul Group, a leading supplier of fireplaces in Europe and North America, includes Jøtul AS and subsidiaries. With a history dating back to 1853, the company offers stand-alone stoves, inserts, frames, and accessories under brands like Jøtul, Scan, and Ravelli. Jøtul fireplaces, made from cast iron, reflect Norwegian tradition, while Scan fireplaces, made from plated steel, feature modern Danish design, and Ravelli pellet stoves showcase Italian design and technology. Production occurs in Norway, Poland, France, and the USA, with products distributed globally through sales companies and distributors. The Group provides products through specialty shops and building materials retail chains in Norway.
news.headline: Jotul Group: major fireplace supplier in Europe/North America. Brands include Jotul, Scan, Ravelli. Products made in Norway, Poland, France, USA.

news.summary: A report titled "Biotic Ingredients Industry, 2025-2030" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The biotics industry has experienced significant changes due to rapid advancements in probiotics, prebiotics, and postbiotics segments. Growth in Europe is fueled by consumer awareness of probiotic advantages, innovations, and supportive regulatory changes. The industry is projected to expand further between 2025-2030, with increasing consumer recognition of the therapeutic properties of these products.
news.headline: Biotic ingredients industry set to grow with postbiotic innovations. Probiotics, prebiotics, and postbiotics driving growth.

news.summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni has taken a unique economic and political approach that's led to a rise in consumer confidence. In May 2025, Italy's consumer confidence index increased from 92.7 to 96.5, with the economic climate index also rising from 89.6 to 97.5. The business confidence climate index went up from 91.6 to 93.1, and manufacturing confidence grew from 85.8 to 86.5. However, Italy's GDP growth is slow at 0.7% in the first quarter of 2025, and it's projected to grow at the same rate in 2026. The country faces challenges like high public debt, productivity stagnation, and demographic issues. Moody's upgraded Italy's outlook to "positive" from "stable" on May 23, maintaining its credit rating at "Baa3." The agency praised Italy's fiscal performance and political stability, supporting the government's economic plans. Despite these improvements, Italy's economic issues persist, with thousands of young people leaving due to limited job prospects. The country has a high proportion of elderly citizens, surpassing the number of children under 10.
news.headline: Italy's Prime Minister Meloni sees increased business and consumer confidence with GDP growth projected at 0.7% in 2026. Moody's upgrades Italy to "positive" outlook despite economic challenges. Youth exodus due to lack of opportunities. Italian bonds strengthened.

news.summary: A company named Domino Data Lab is making strides in the tech industry by offering high-level AI governance, hybrid cloud orchestration, and innovative generative AI solutions. This San Francisco-based company's Enterprise AI Platform has gained the trust of heavily regulated sectors. Their work is recognized and valued by various industries, proving their reliability. The date of May 30, 2025, marks another milestone in Domino's journey toward shaping the future of AI technology.
news.headline: Domino Data Lab recognized as a Visionary in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Science and ML Platforms in 2025.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Super League Enterprise, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLE) based in Santa Monica, California, completed a firm commitment underwritten public offering. The offering generated around $500,000 in gross proceeds for the Company, with deductions expected for underwriting fees and other offering expenses. Super League Enterprise is recognized for revolutionizing brand-consumer connections using playable media.
news.headline: Super League Enterprise closes underwritten public offering, raising $500,000, before expenses.

news.summary: Cox Farms, the leading greenhouse operator in North America and a subsidiary of Cox Enterprises, recently revealed a collaboration with Feeding America® aimed at distributing fresh produce to communities across the country. This partnership, established in May 2025, signifies a concerted effort to address food insecurity issues prevalent nationwide. Cox Farms, known for its extensive greenhouse operations, is gearing up to contribute significantly to this initiative, leveraging their resources to make a tangible impact on local communities. Through this joint effort, a substantial quantity of fresh produce is set to be made available for distribution, with the aim of combating hunger and supporting those in need.
news.headline: Cox Farms donates 1 million pounds of fresh food to families in need through partnership with Feeding America®.

news.summary: Beijing is optimistic about the future of its C919 single-aisle jet despite facing several delays. The success of the aircraft largely relies on obtaining engines, avionics, and other essential equipment from Western companies.
news.headline: Trump's focus shifts to China's C919 plane, seen as a symbol of power by Beijing. C919 relies on Western components.

news.summary: The global Reed Switch Device Market is expected to grow from USD 1.2 billion in 2024 to USD 2.2 billion by 2034, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.5%. The growth is attributed to increased adoption across industries like automotive, industrial automation, and consumer electronics. Single Pole Reed Switches lead the market (45%), followed by Double Pole (30%) and Multi-Contact (25%) types. By region, North America holds a 45% revenue share, while Asia-Pacific is the fastest-growing region. Key drivers include rising automation and demand for energy-efficient components, with challenges like competition and supply chain fluctuations. Opportunities lie in IoT integration and renewables. Asia-Pacific and North America are key markets, with automotive and healthcare sectors driving demand. Challenges include competition and supply chain disruptions.
news.headline: Global Reed Switch Device Market to reach $2.2B by 2034, growing at 6.5% CAGR. Market primarily driven by automotive, industrial automation, and consumer electronics. North America leads with 45% revenue share; Asia-Pacific fastest-growing region with CAGR of 8%. Automotive dominates market with 35% share, followed by Industrial Automation (25%) and Consumer Electronics (20%). Key drivers include rising automation, demand for energy-efficient components, IoT expansion, and sustainable tech regulations. Opportunities in smart devices, renewable energy systems, and miniaturized sensors. Key challenges include competition from alternative sensors, supply chain disruptions, and stringent environmental regulations. Emerging trends include miniaturization, IoT integration, and adoption in renewable energy systems.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Siddhi Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: SDHIU) revealed that starting June 4, 2025, purchasers of units from the Company's IPO will have the option to trade its ordinary shares and rights separately.
news.headline: Siddhi Acquisition Corp to allow separate trading of shares and rights from June 4, 2025. (Numbers: June 4, 2025)

news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on May 30, 2025, airlines are implementing stricter carry-on size restrictions in a bid to streamline boarding procedures and increase profits. As a result, travelers could encounter elevated charges for carry-ons and, in certain instances, may be required to check their luggage due to the...
news.headline: Airlines are tightening carry-on size limits to improve boarding process. Passengers may face higher fees.

news.summary: On May 31, 2025, a game in the Major League Rugby will take place at SeatGeek Stadium in Chicago. The Chicago Hounds professional rugby team, along with the Chicagoland Chamber of Commerce, are collaborating for this cause. Their aim is to raise awareness and support for suicide prevention through this match. The event will benefit AFSP Illinois, and it is expected to draw significant attention as it combines sports and a vital cause.
news.headline: Chicago Hounds & Chicagoland Chamber partner to tackle suicide prevention. May 31 match to benefit AFSP Illinois at SeatGeek Stadium.

news.summary: The Location-Based Entertainment (LBE) Market is predicted to grow from USD 5.47 billion in 2024 to USD 15.33 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 22.9%. LBE includes immersive experiences in physical locations like theme parks and arcades, utilizing technologies like AR/VR, projection mapping, and interactive gaming. These systems offer applications in gaming, simulation, virtual tourism, and education, providing personalized, interactive experiences. Top companies in this market include Microsoft, Google, Meta, and NVIDIA. Gaming is expected to lead as the largest application segment within the LBE market due to the rising demand for immersive gameplay experiences.
news.headline: Location-Based Entertainment market to reach $15.33B by 2029, dominated by Microsoft, Google, Meta, with growth fueled by advanced technologies and rising consumer spending.

news.summary: On May 21, 2025, Coop Pank AS's supervisory board approved an increase in the share capital by 457,188.16 euros through the issuance of new ordinary shares. This decision was made to facilitate the exercise of options granted under the approved option program from November 8, 2019. A total of 70 current and former employees subscribed for 670,900 shares, amounting to 841,979.50 euros, representing 100% of the total new shares issued. All option holders submitted timely subscription applications and payments for the shares.
news.headline: Coop Pank AS increases share capital by 457,188.16 euros for option programme, 70 employees subscribed for 670,900 shares at EUR 841,979.50.

news.summary: At the close of March this year, Invalda INVL possessed a total equity of EUR 238.1 million, equivalent to EUR 19.82 per share. These numbers represent a substantial increase of 30.9% and 30.8% as compared to the previous year, factoring in the dividends disbursed during this period.
news.headline: Invalda INVL's unaudited data for Q1 2025 shows equity at EUR 238.1M, a 30.9% increase from last year, EUR 19.82 per share.

news.summary: In recent years, inland regions have experienced significant flooding incidents, as noted by experts. It is important to highlight that standard homeowner insurance policies do not provide coverage for flood damage.
news.headline: Recent years have seen a rise in severe flooding in inland areas. Remember, homeowner policies don't cover flood damage. #BePrepared

news.summary: The Chief Executive Officer of EPR Properties (NYSE:EPR), Gregory Silvers, is scheduled to speak at Nareit's REITweek: 2025 Investor Conference in New York on June 3, 2025, at 1:45 PM Eastern Time. The presentation will highlight the company's strategic initiatives and financial performance to potential investors. This event is crucial for providing insights into EPR Properties' operations and may impact its stock performance in the near future.
news.headline: EPR Properties CEO to present at Nareit's REITweek: 2025 Investor Conference in New York on June 3 at 1:45 PM ET.

news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, Baldwin-Howell Properties LLC has recently obtained a 2.63-acre plot at 4575 Gun Club Road. They are set to begin construction later this year on a cutting-edge 100,000-square-foot self-storage facility that will be fully climate-controlled. This acquisition signifies the company's fourth self-storage project in the past year, bringing their total construction area to an impressive 260,000 square feet.
news.headline: Baldwin-Howell to build 100,000 sqft self-storage facility in West Palm Beach on 2.63-acre parcel. This is their 4th site in 12 months.

news.summary: A recent report on the China Electric Vehicle and Charging Infrastructure Market highlights investment opportunities and future outlook. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, includes 50+ key performance indicators covering EV market size by value and volume, vehicle type, price point, propulsion type, and location. The market is projected to grow by 14% annually as of Q2 2025. This signifies significant growth in the EV and charging infrastructure sector in China, indicating a promising future for investors and industry players.
news.headline: China's Electric Vehicle and Charging Infrastructure Market shows rapid growth, expected to expand by 14% YoY by 2025.

news.summary: SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI), a digital financial services platform, announced its participation in two investor conferences. The company's CFO, Chris Lapointe, will engage in fireside chat discussions at the 45th Annual William Blair Growth Stock Conference and the Mizuho Technology Conference. These events provide opportunities for investors to learn more about SoFi's offerings, with the CFO sharing insights on the company's strategies. Interested parties can access full session details for the conferences where SoFi will be represented.
news.headline: SoFi (NASDAQ: SOFI) to join 45th Annual William Blair Growth Stock Conference and Mizuho Technology Conference with CFO Chris Lapointe on fireside chats.

news.summary: In Arlington Heights, Illinois, GE HealthCare revealed that the NCCN Guidelines for Clinical Oncology have endorsed the use of FES PET for systemic staging in individuals with metastatic Invasive Lobular Carcinoma.
news.headline: NCCN Guidelines now recommend FES PET imaging for systemic staging in metastatic ILC patients.

news.summary: Paris and Singapore - TotalEnergies and RGE, a prominent player in the bio-based resources and energy domains, have disclosed the approval from Singapore’s Energy Market Authority (EMA) for their shared venture, Singa Renewables. The EMA has granted a preliminary permit for Singa to bring in 1 gigawatt (GW) of renewable energy from Indonesia. Concurrently, the partners have inked a Memorandum of Understanding with Singapore Energy Interconnections (SGEI) for collaborative development efforts.
news.headline: TotalEnergies & RGE's joint venture Singa Renewables awarded a conditional license to import 1 GW of renewable power from Indonesia to Singapore. Signed a MoU with SGEI for development.

news.summary: Angeles Investors, a prominent investment group based in Mountain View, California, has revealed the 2025 Angeles 100 list. This list recognizes the best ventures in America and is a celebration of Latino growth. Angeles Investors aims to find, fund, and support these top ventures, showcasing the diverse talent and opportunities within the community. This year's Angeles 100 highlights outstanding entrepreneurial achievements and showcases the top companies making an impact in the business world.
news.headline: Angeles Investors reveals 2025 Angeles 100 honorees at Silicon Valley summit. Celebrating top ventures.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Wolfson BTR, the state's inaugural large-scale Build-to-Rent (BTR) developer, marked a significant milestone with a ribbon-cutting event on April 22, 2025. The celebration honored the completion of the initial phase of the Encanto Isla townhome community. Alongside collaborators Paragon Group and contractor First Florida, Wolfson introduced the first set of 214 new BTR townhomes within two adjacent communities. These properties will be overseen by Greystar, operating under its Summerwe brand.
news.headline: Wolfson BTR opens 214-unit Build-to-Rent community in Orlando, FL. Ribbon cutting held on April 22, 2025.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on May 30, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, has announced the launch of Bybit Earnival, a rewards program for Bybit Earn users. The program will run for four weeks until June 22. Eligible Bybit users can participate in the rewards program by signing up...
news.headline: Bybit launches 4-week rewards program, Bybit Earnival, for users until June 22, 2025. World's 2nd largest crypto exchange.

news.summary: A company headquartered in Minnesota has successfully installed approximately 7 gigawatts of power in the central region of the United States. This achievement comes after Brookfield Asset Management and its institutional partners acquired National Grid Renewables. The acquisition was announced on May 30, 2025, in Minneapolis.
news.headline: National Grid Renewables, now Geronimo Power, to progress under Brookfield ownership with 7 GW deployment in America.

news.summary: Shares of energy company EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE: EOG) are seeing a decrease in premarket trading on Friday following the announcement of their acquisition of Encino Acquisition Partners (EAP) for a total of $5.6 billion, encompassing EAP's net debt. The payment for this acquisition, to be made to the sellers CPP and Encino Energy, will involve a combination of cash and debt, with $3.5 billion in new debt and $2.1 billion in cash. The transaction is anticipated to finalize in the latter part of 2025, pending clearance under the Hart-Scott-Rodino Act. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: EOG Resources acquires Encino Acquisition Partners for $5.6 billion, plans to pay with $3.5 billion debt and $2.1 billion cash.

news.summary: PharmAla has issued a cautionary statement to the public, clarifying that it does not distribute MDMA to individuals. The company emphasized the need for vigilance against counterfeit items and illicit sales occurring online. Consumers are advised to stay cautious and avoid purchasing unauthorized products.
news.headline: PharmAla Biotech warns public about fake products claiming to be from PharmAla, does not sell MDMA to consumers.

(NYSE: DSX), a renowned global shipping firm focusing on the ownership and bareboat charter-in of dry bulk vessels, conducted its Annual Shareholders Meeting. news.summary: In College Park, Maryland, on May 30, 2025, the University of Maryland's Robert H. Smith School of Business unveiled its latest Summer Reading List for Business Leaders. The selection includes recommendations from faculty members covering a range of topics such as investing, neuroscience, human connection, and others. One highlight is a novel that draws inspiration from a radio. This annual reading list serves as a valuable resource for business leaders seeking to broaden their knowledge and insights.
news.headline: UMD Smith experts provide summer reading list for business leaders featuring picks on investing, neuroscience, and human connection.

news.summary: In Redwood City, California, Electronic Arts Inc. is launching F1® 25, the official game of the 2025 FIA Formula One World Championship™. It is now available on PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC. Players can immerse themselves in the world of Formula One through various features such as My Team 2.0 where they can become a team owner, and the beloved story mode, Braking Point, which brings the emotional rollercoaster of competing at the front of the grid. Electronic Arts Inc. trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EA.
news.headline: EA releases F1® 25 game, official of 2025 FIA Formula One World Championship™ on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, PC today. My Team 2.0 and Braking Point modes available for players.

news.summary: In Washington, the Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) revealed details about the Proof of Concept (PoC) demonstrations set for Fiber Connect 2025 on June 1-4 in Nashville, Tenn. The FBA, in collaboration with the Broadband Forum, will host the PoC Showcase featuring six PoCs showcasing innovations from 11 companies. These demonstrations have the potential to revolutionize the Connected Home and/or broadband subscriber experience. Each PoC will utilize one of three Broadband Forum specifications for fib...
news.headline: Fiber Connect 2025 to showcase 6 PoC demos in collaboration with 11 companies transforming Connected Home/broadband experience.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Artera unveiled news at the 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting. They showcased two new abstracts, with one selected for Best of ASCO 2025, a prestigious recognition for studies with significant influence on cancer care. The oral presentation highlights the initial validated MMAI algorithm. The developer specializes in multimodal artificial intelligence (MMAI) cancer tests, indicating promising advancements in cancer prognostic and predictive technologies.
news.headline: Artera to showcase validated MMAI platform at 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting, selected for Best of ASCO with two abstracts.

news.summary: Based in Dallas, Emburse, known for its cutting-edge travel and expense management solutions for progressive companies, has received a Bronze Stevie® Award for being the Most Innovative Tech Company of the Year in the category of Up to 2,500 Employees at the 23rd Annual American Business Awards®. This accolade highlights Emburse's dedication to promoting innovation-centered culture and its determination to revolutionize Expense Intelligence for finance teams. Led by the organization's visionary leadership, Emburse sets a new standard in the industry.
news.headline: Emburse wins Bronze Stevie® Award for Most Innovative Tech Company of the Year; category for up to 2,500 employees.
